scripts.setup: pnpm run generate-keys && pnpm run generate-emails && pnpm run verify-emails && pnpm run generate-circuits
scripts.benchmark:gates: pnpm run setup && pnpm run gate-count
scripts.benchmark:all: pnpm run setup && pnpm run gate-count && pnpm run generate-inputs && pnpm run benchmark:prove && pnpm run report
scripts.clean: npx tsx -e "import{execSync}from'child_process';try{execSync('trash circuits emails keys results inputs',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch{console.log('Nothing to clean')}"
